title: nordenstamia fabrisii
intro: Nordenstamia fabrisii, also known as Fabris' nordenstamia, is a shrub species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to southern Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Nordenstamia fabrisii are said to include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Herbal preparations of Nordenstamia fabrisii include infusions, decoctions, and infusions made by steeping the dried leaves and flowers in hot water, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
